title: Strait of Hormuz Is Open During Cease-Fire in Lebanon, U.S. and Iran Say
summary_full: Statements from President Trump and Iran aimed to raise confidence in the safety of the waterway, but shipping experts said risks remained.
summary_public: Statements from President Trump and Iran aimed to raise confidence in the safety of the waterway, but shipping experts said risks remained.
